name: Calc my ladder fall case worth in Saint George UT?
description: Medical + wages + PPD = value; free lawyer calc.

mainEntity.name: Calc my ladder fall case worth in Saint George UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + wages + PPD = value; free lawyer calc.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Use formula: medical + 66% lost wages x duration + PPD schedule value.**[1]

E.g., $50K medical + $20K wages + $40K PPD = $110K base.

- Age, job factor in.
- Attorney evals free.

Multipliers for severe cases.
